title: Remote Office Latency and DNS Drift
summary: Users in branch office report slow SaaS access and intermittent name resolution failures.
context: A branch office moved to a new ISP circuit. Soon after cutover, users report application slowness, especially during morning sync windows.

artifacts.content:

artifacts.label: WAN RTT time series
artifacts.summary: RTT is stable near 25ms until 09:10, then rises above 90ms during backup traffic before partially recovering.
